summary: The implementation covers all 8 requirements with product management, cart functionality, payment options (including UPI ID 9892246308-2@axl), search, category filtering, contact footer, and a yellow-themed design. However, the yellow theme implementation uses generic neutral colors rather than the requested vibrant yellow throughout the site.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement a yellow color theme throughout the website with a classic, minimalist design inspired by Apple's aesthetic
missing_requirements.reason: The color theme uses neutral grays/whites instead of yellow as the dominant color. In frontend/src/index.css, the primary color is defined as generic neutrals (e.g., '--primary: 0.205 0 0' which is grayscale in OKLCH), not yellow. The constraint specified 'yellow as the primary theme color throughout the website' but the implementation uses a standard neutral theme.

hallucinated_features.description: Social media links (Facebook, Instagram, X/Twitter) in footer
hallucinated_features.reason: The footer includes social media icon links that were not requested in any requirement. REQ-8 only specified displaying phone number and address.
The CSS includes comprehensive dark mode color definitions (.dark class) which was not part of any requirement or acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: Caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking in footer
hallucinated_features.reason: Footer includes a branded link to caffeine.ai with UTM parameters that was not requested in requirements.
